scripts.start: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); const pnpm=process.platform==='win32'?'pnpm.cmd':'pnpm'; if(!fs.existsSync('frontend/node_modules/react-scripts')){ console.log('Frontend node_modules missing or incomplete. Installing dependencies...'); cp.execSync(pnpm+' --dir frontend install', {stdio:'inherit'}); } cp.spawn(pnpm, ['run', 'start:backend'], {stdio:'inherit', shell:true}); cp.spawn(pnpm, ['run', 'start:frontend'], {stdio:'inherit', shell:true});"
scripts.start:backend: python3 backend/manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 || python backend/manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 || (echo Error: Python is not installed. Please install Python. && exit 1)
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && (../.venv/bin/python manage.py test customer || ..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python manage.py test customer || ../.venv/Scripts/python manage.py test customer || python manage.py test customer)
